description: Extend CI to run on Windows, macOS, and Linux; resolve platform-specific dependency and path issues; add binary distribution for end-user deployment.
oracle_notes: Current CI only runs on ubuntu-latest. The developer platform is Windows, but no Windows CI exists. pixi is cross-platform but torch, lancedb, and onnxruntime have platform-specific wheels. Need to validate all three OS targets before calling the product mature.
